case_title: DALTON ALEXANDER SMILEY VS. FULL GLASS - BRIGHT CELLARS, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF DALTON ALEXANDER SMILEY IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (506/JPT)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FULL GLASS - BRIGHT CELLARS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMILEY, DALTON ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FULL GLASS - BRIGHT CELLARS, INC. $10,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,025.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,800.00 FILED BY SMILEY, DALTON ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT FULL GLASS - BRIGHT CELLARS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $110 SERVED JUN-28-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FULL GLASS - BRIGHT CELLARS, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SMILEY, DALTON ALEXANDER
